title: smyrnium idaeum
intro: Smyrnium idaeum, also known as Cretan carrot or carrot parsley, is a perennial plant species within the carrot family, native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Smyrnium idaeum include its potential to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestive health. Herbal preparations of Smyrnium idaeum include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
